sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ لَمَى بِالْفَرَحِ حِينَ تَلَقَّتْ هَدِيَّةً مِنْ أَبِيهَا.
sentences.translation: Lama se obradovala kada je dobila poklon od oca.
sentences.translationEn: Lama felt joy when she received a gift from her father.

sentences.arabic: لَيْسَتِ الْهَدِيَّةُ غَالِيَةً لَكِنَّ الأَهَمَّ هُوَ الْمَعْنَى.
sentences.translation: Poklon nije skup ali važnije je značenje.
sentences.translationEn: The gift is not expensive but what matters more is the meaning.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الأَبُ «فَكَّرْتُ فِيكِ وَاخْتَرْتُ هَذَا لَكِ».
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao "mislio sam na tebe i izabrao sam ovo za tebe".
sentences.translationEn: The father said "I thought of you and chose this for you".

sentences.translation: Osjećaj da smo važni nas čini sretnima.
sentences.translationEn: Feeling that we are important makes us happy.
